<!-- Do not edit manually; regenerate with: clef interface generate -->
# Interface Manifest Schema Reference

Complete schema for `interface.yaml` manifest files.

## Root Structure

```yaml
interface:
  name: my-api
  version: "0.1.0"
  # Optional: dual-manifest type (see Dual-Manifest Architecture below)
  manifest_type: config | content | single
  description: "Human-readable description"
```

## Dual-Manifest Architecture (Section 6.1–6.2)

Applications with both developer-facing and user-facing surfaces split their
Bind configuration into two companion manifests rather than one monolithic file.
This is the **dual-manifest Bind architecture**:

| Manifest | `manifest_type` | Auth default | Base path | Who uses it |
|----------|----------------|--------------|-----------|-------------|
| Config manifest | `config` | `admin` (required) | `/api/admin` | Developers, CI/CD, admin tools |
| Content manifest | `content` | `anonymous` (optional) | `/api/content` | End users, public clients |

Generate both with:

```bash
clef scaffold interface --name my-app --mode dual
```

Or programmatically via `InterfaceScaffoldGen/generateDual`:

```typescript
await interfaceScaffoldGenHandler.generateDual({
  name: 'my-app',
  targets: ['rest', 'graphql', 'mcp', 'cli'],
  sdks: ['typescript', 'python'],
});
// Produces:
//   interfaces/my-app-config.interface.yaml  (manifest_type: config)
//   interfaces/my-app-content.interface.yaml  (manifest_type: content)
```

### Config Manifest (Section 6.1)

```yaml
interface:
  name: my-app-config
  version: "0.1.0"
  manifest_type: config
  description: "Developer-facing administration interface"

auth:
  required: true
  default_role: admin
  strategies:
    - cookie
    - api_key
    - oauth

targets:
  rest:
    basePath: /api/admin
  graphql:
    path: /graphql/admin
  mcp:
    name: my-app-admin

concepts:
  - name: Schema
    source: repertoire/concepts/foundation/schema.concept
    operations: [list, get, create, update, delete]
```

### Content Manifest (Section 6.2)

```yaml
interface:
  name: my-app-content
  version: "0.1.0"
  manifest_type: content
  description: "User-facing content interface"

auth:
  required: false
  default_role: anonymous
  strategies:
    - cookie
    - bearer_token
    - oauth
    - wallet

targets:
  rest:
    basePath: /api/content
  graphql:
    path: /graphql
  mcp:
    name: my-app-content

concepts:
  - name: ContentStorage
    source: repertoire/concepts/foundation/content-storage.concept
    operations: [list, get, create, save, delete, query]
```

The `manifest_type` field is consumed by:
- `InterfaceGenerator/plan` — selects auth policy and base path defaults
- Bind targets — adjust endpoint grouping and code generation settings
- Score — annotates generated entities with their manifest membership

## Targets

```yaml
targets:
  rest:
    basePath: /api
    framework: hono
    versioning: url
  graphql:
    path: /graphql
    relay: true
    subscriptions: true
  grpc:
    package: app.v1
  cli:
    name: my-cli
    shell: [bash, zsh, fish]
  mcp:
    name: my-mcp-server
    transport: stdio
  claude-skills:
    name: my-skills
    progressive: true
```

## SDKs

```yaml
sdk:
  typescript:
    packageName: "@app/sdk"
    moduleSystem: esm
  python:
    packageName: app-sdk
    asyncSupport: true
  go:
    modulePath: github.com/org/app-sdk-go
  rust:
    packageName: app-sdk
  java:
    packageName: com.org.app.sdk
  swift:
    packageName: AppSDK
```

## Specs

```yaml
specs:
  openapi: true
  asyncapi: false
```

## Per-Concept Overrides

```yaml
concepts:
  User:
    rest:
      basePath: /api/users
    graphql:
      typeName: User
  Article:
    rest:
      basePath: /api/articles
```

## Output

```yaml
output:
  dir: ./generated/interface
  clean: true
grouping:
  strategy: per-concept
```
